scenarios.title: Flat rate margin calculated with higher of long or short positions included

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has positions in sub-margin groups defined on HKEX website
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) clearing participant has positions in sub-margin groups defined on HKEX website

given_steps.step_text: Sub-group 1 contains long positions with total absolute market value of 30,000,000 HKD and short positions with total absolute market value of 60,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group \d+ contains long positions with total absolute market value of \d+,\d+,\d+ HKD and short positions with total absolute market value of \d+,\d+,\d+ HKD

given_steps.step_text: Flat margin rates are defined under FieldType 3
given_steps.step_pattern: Flat margin rates are defined under FieldType \d+

given_steps.step_text: A flat rate margin multiplier of 2 is assigned per DWH0081C report
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) flat rate margin multiplier of \d+ is assigned per DWH0081C report

when_steps.step_text: The flat rate margin calculation is performed following Step 1, Step 2, and Step 3
when_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) flat rate margin calculation is performed following Step \d+, Step \d+, and Step \d+

then_steps.step_text: All short sub-group 1 positions are included in flat rate margin calculation
then_steps.step_pattern: All short sub-group \d+ positions are included in flat rate margin calculation

then_steps.step_text: All long sub-group 1 positions are excluded from flat rate margin calculation
then_steps.step_pattern: All long sub-group \d+ positions are excluded from flat rate margin calculation

then_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin after applying margin multiplier equals 15,180,000 HKD
then_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin after applying margin multiplier equals \d+,\d+,\d+ HKD

assumptions: Flat margin rates used are 12% for sub-group 1, 30% for sub-group 2, 55% for sub-group 3 as per example

scenarios.title: Flat rate margin when long and short absolute market values are equal

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has positions in a sub-margin group
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) clearing participant has positions in (?:a|an|the) sub-margin group

given_steps.step_text: Total absolute market value of long positions equals total absolute market value of short positions at exactly 50,000,000 HKD each
given_steps.step_pattern: Total absolute market value of long positions equals total absolute market value of short positions at exactly \d+,\d+,\d+ HKD each

when_steps.step_text: The flat rate margin calculation compares long and short absolute market values for the sub-margin group
when_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) flat rate margin calculation compares long and short absolute market values for (?:a|an|the) sub-margin group

then_steps.step_text: The system determines which side to include based on tie-breaking rules defined by HKEX
then_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) system determines which side to include based on tie-breaking rules defined by HKEX

assumptions: Tie-breaking behavior when long equals short is not explicitly defined in the evidence; system should have documented tie-breaking logic

when_steps.step_text: The system validates input data including positions identified per §3.2.2, sub-margin groups from HKEX website, flat margin rates under FieldType 3, and margin multiplier from DWH0081C report

then_steps.step_text: All required data elements are validated as present and correctly formatted

then_steps.step_pattern: Position identification per §\d+.\d+.\d+ is confirmed

then_steps.step_pattern: Sub-margin group assignments are validated against HKEX website definitions

scenarios.title: Calculate favorable MTM using portfolio values

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has a portfolio with Market valuePortfolio of -287,850,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) clearing participant has (?:a|an|the) portfolio with Market valuePortfolio of -\d+,\d+,\d+ HKD

given_steps.step_text: The portfolio has Contract valuePortfolio of -300,550,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) portfolio has Contract valuePortfolio of -\d+,\d+,\d+ HKD

when_steps.step_text: The system calculates favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio
when_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) system calculates favorable MTM using (?:a|an|the) formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio

then_steps.step_text: The favorable MTM is calculated as (-287,850,000) - (-300,550,000) = 12,700,000
then_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) favorable MTM is calculated as (-\d+,\d+,\d+) - (-\d+,\d+,\d+) = \d+,\d+,\d+

then_steps.step_text: A positive result indicates favorable MTM
then_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) positive result indicates favorable MTM

assumptions: Portfolio values are provided in HKD equivalent
Rounding is applied at position level as per Appendix 4.6

then_steps.step_text: The MTM requirement is zero

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals the rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals (?:a|an|the) rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin

assumptions: Zero result represents the boundary between favorable MTM and MTM requirement

feature_description: Validates that margin credit is correctly applied to calculate net margin after credit for clearing participants.

scenarios.title: Apply margin credit to calculate net margin after credit

given_steps.step_text: a clearing participant has a net margin of 46,930,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) clearing participant has (?:a|an|the) net margin of \d+,\d+,\d+ HKD

given_steps.step_text: the margin credit granted is 5,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) margin credit granted is \d+,\d+,\d+ HKD

when_steps.step_text: the system calculates net margin after credit using the formula Maximum[0, (Net margin - Margin credit)]
when_steps.step_pattern: (?:a|an|the) system calculates net margin after credit using (?:a|an|the) formula Maximum[\d+, (Net margin - Margin credit)]

then_steps.step_text: net margin after credit is calculated as Maximum[0, (46,930,000 - 5,000,000)] = 41,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: net margin after credit is calculated as Maximum[\d+, (\d+,\d+,\d+ - \d+,\d+,\d+)] = \d+,\d+,\d+

assumptions: Margin credit is normally 5,000,000 as specified
Net margin value is derived from prior calculation steps
